header: Contribution Chart for polished analytics workspace
subheadline: Turns dense operational signals into a clean shadcn-style surface with compact labels and useful status context.
left_stat_detail: A sharp, production-minded contribution chart using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so operators can spot movement across every product signal.
